setup: E3b (any-hero vs Gatot-specific): Mueller's GORDON-led T7 Infantry (Gordon = Lancer hero, adds NO Infantry stats; Inf panels stay at the 179.1 baseline) vs the same Alpaca FC1T1+Vulcanus. Kill in [72,74] ~= the no-hero prediction (75-77; -3% via Gordon's enemy debuffs) -> no any-hero slowdown; the dealer slowdown is Gatot-inert-specific.

assumptions: Gordon counters cross-fit: S2=24 = floor(T/3), S3=18 = floor(T/4) at T in [72,74] -- first evidence of the Gordon cadences

stats_capture.notes: Gordon aura lands on LANCER (415.7/405.9 = 179.1/169.2 + ~236.6); Infantry panels UNCHANGED -- class-locked aura confirmed

hero_skills.name: Gordon Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: cadence hypothesis 2026-07-19 (cross-validated vs the Vulcanus clock in E3b): S1 every 2nd turn, S2 every 3rd, S3 every 4th (floor(T/n)); effects not yet tooltip-captured

hero_skills.name: Gordon Skill 2
hero_skills.effect: cadence hypothesis 2026-07-19 (cross-validated vs the Vulcanus clock in E3b): S1 every 2nd turn, S2 every 3rd, S3 every 4th (floor(T/n)); effects not yet tooltip-captured

hero_skills.name: Gordon Skill 3
hero_skills.effect: cadence hypothesis 2026-07-19 (cross-validated vs the Vulcanus clock in E3b): S1 every 2nd turn, S2 every 3rd, S3 every 4th (floor(T/n)); effects not yet tooltip-captured

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: -4% enemy Troops Attack once at start (level not shown)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 2
hero_skills.effect: every 6th attack of EACH Vulcanus-side unit, +20% (per-unit counter model, 2026-07-19)

hero_skills.name: True Strike
hero_skills.effect: turns 3,6,9,...: -12% enemy Inf/Lan Def 3 turns AND +12% own MM Attack 1 turn

notes: ANY-HERO TEST: Gordon-led T7 kills in [72,74] vs the no-hero 75-77 (-3%, consistent with Gordon's small enemy debuffs) -> a hero on the dealer does NOT cause the 151127 slowdown; it is Gatot-inert-specific.
GORDON AURA MEASURED (Mueller Lv51 copy): +236.6/+236.7 A/D on Lancer (+5.3 L / +4.3 H, source unconfirmed); Infantry untouched -- heroes buff ONLY their own class.
GORDON CADENCES (first observation, cross-validated against the Vulcanus clock): S2 every 3rd turn, S3 every 4th; S1 showed no procs on this copy.
